rounds: The 6am necklace buy — no deliberating, just done. The painted toes on a Saturday. Standing in a chemist comparing nail shades without flinching. Joy police showed up and Matt did the thing anyway. That's three wins in one week and I'm not calming down about it.
pattern: They're loudest before the act — once Matt's already moving, they can't keep up.
focus: Triniful Trial — wear the best-fitting piece for Matt.
